summary: Tested Open/Close Booking Control & Lineup Notifications features. Fixed missing broadcast_to_user function in websocket_manager.py. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: (1) LineupCard shows prominent Open/Close toggle with green switch when session is open, (2) Toggle label shows 'Open for Bookings' when open and 'Closed to New Surfers' when closed, (3) Helper text shows 'Surfers can discover & join this session' when open and 'Only existing crew can see this session' when closed, (4) Toggle click successfully calls POST /api/bookings/{id}/lineup/status endpoint, (5) Toast notifications appear on toggle ('Session opened for new surfers!' / 'Session closed to new bookings'), (6) Backend broadcasts WebSocket notifications to all participants via broadcast_lineup_update and broadcast_to_user functions, (7) LineupNotifications service handles toast and push notifications for session status changes, (8) PhotographerSessionManager has matching open/close toggle in Settings tab with Switch component, (9) All 6 pytest tests pass for the lineup status endpoint.

details: Toggle button visible directly on LineupCard (not hidden in drawer)
Green switch when session is open (bg-green-500)
Gray switch when session is closed
data-testid='toggle-session-status-{id}' attribute present
Toggle is clickable and triggers API call
'Open for Bookings' label when session is open
'Closed to New Surfers' label when session is closed
'Surfers can discover & join this session' helper text when open
'Only existing crew can see this session' helper text when closed
Unlock icon when open, Lock icon when closed
POST /api/bookings/{id}/lineup/status endpoint works correctly
Accepts body: {status: 'open'|'closed'}
Returns: {message, booking_id, lineup_status, allow_splitting}
Broadcasts WebSocket notifications to all participants
All 6 pytest tests pass
LineupNotifications.js service exists with handleLineupNotification function
Supports session_opened, session_closed, session_locked notification types
Toast notifications via sonner library
Push notifications via browser Notification API
Sound alerts via Web Audio API
broadcast_lineup_update function broadcasts to lineup room
broadcast_to_user function broadcasts to individual user rooms (FIXED - was missing)
useLineupWebSocket hook processes WebSocket events
useUserWebSocket hook receives personal notifications
SessionStatusControl component has matching open/close toggle
Switch component for toggling session status
'Session Open for Bookings' / 'Session Closed' labels
Helper text explaining current state
Lock & Finalize and Cancel & Refund buttons present
'Session opened for new surfers!' toast on opening
'Session closed to new bookings' toast on closing
Toast appears via sonner library

bug_fixed.root_cause: The broadcast_to_user function was referenced in bookings.py but not defined in websocket_manager.py
bug_fixed.verification: Toggle now works correctly, backend returns 200 status
